title: David Oxley
compiled_truth: David Oxley is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-13), David Oxley sent 228 and received 960 emails, totalling 1188 interactions. Top correspondents: [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (128), [Michelle Cash](people/michelle-cash) (73), [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (64), [Jeanie Slone](people/jeanie-slone) (29), [Greg Whalley](people/greg-whalley) (28). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, deleted_items, enron_updates, inbox, non_us_offices, old_inbox.
